paper_title: CodeQuant: Unified Clustering and Quantization for Enhanced Outlier Smoothing in Low-Precision Mixture-of-Experts
claim: CodeQuant improves low-bit MoE PTQ accuracy over uniform quantization and prior smoothing/rotation baselines.

paper_title: CodeQuant: Unified Clustering and Quantization for Enhanced Outlier Smoothing in Low-Precision Mixture-of-Experts
claim: CodeQuant is especially helpful under very low-bit or extreme compression settings.

paper_title: CodeQuant: Unified Clustering and Quantization for Enhanced Outlier Smoothing in Low-Precision Mixture-of-Experts
claim: AOS learned rotation improves over random rotation for activation quantization.

paper_title: CodeQuant: Unified Clustering and Quantization for Enhanced Outlier Smoothing in Low-Precision Mixture-of-Experts
claim: Router KL regularization improves performance and stabilizes MoE routing under quantization.

paper_title: CodeQuant: Unified Clustering and Quantization for Enhanced Outlier Smoothing in Low-Precision Mixture-of-Experts
claim: POG helps block-wise clustering by improving subgroup grouping before centroid assignment.

paper_title: CodeQuant: Unified Clustering and Quantization for Enhanced Outlier Smoothing in Low-Precision Mixture-of-Experts
claim: LUT-based clustered inference can improve low-bit MoE inference latency.
